rule: Species prejudice exists but varies by region, class and history.
mechanic: prejudice_mod should depend on culture, law, religion and recent conflict.

rule: Mixed cities are common around ports, roads, mines and capitals.
mechanic: provinces should support species composition, not one-species absolutes.

rule: Intermarriage may be rare or legally contested; adoption, fosterage and hostage upbringing matter regardless.
mechanic: dynastic systems should support adoption/fosterage and legal kinship.

rule: Legal status can matter more than species.
mechanic: rank/class/law should modify social power independently of species.
culture_shift should occur over generations and may preserve species-community law.
